source_name: 烏魯瓦圖六善度假村概覽

source_name: 烏魯瓦圖六善酒店婚禮頁面
reliability_notes: Most important official wedding page for venue list and guest capacities.

source_name: 烏魯瓦圖六善酒店會議和場地
reliability_notes: Useful official event-space source for the wider venue mix beyond weddings copy.

reliability_notes: Best official accommodation page for the key-count mix and villa inventory.
raw_excerpt_summary: 度假村擁有 28 間空中套房和頂層公寓以及 75 間懸崖泳池別墅。

source_name: 烏魯瓦圖六善酒店 如何前往
reliability_notes: Official transport source for airport timing.
raw_excerpt_summary: 度假村距離伍拉賴國際機場 (Ngurah Rai International Airport) 以南約 45 分鐘車程。

source_name: 印尼六善度假村列表
reliability_notes: Important current-status source because the Indonesia portfolio page explicitly surfaces the closure note.

reliability_notes: Multi-venue comparison post with pricing and feature analysis

source_name: WeddingKu 婚禮平台
reliability_notes: 印尼婚禮媒合平台，提供場地套餐報價與真實新人評論。評論以印尼語為主。
raw_excerpt_summary: 套餐：Andakara Lawn（70人起，IDR 1,815,000/人）；Cinema Paradiso（30人起，IDR 1,815,000/人）；Standing Reception: 80 to 200 pax（150人起，IDR 1,815,000/人）；Real Wedding 案例：Linda & Frank、Darren & Jessica、Hermanto & Janet
